tools.name: list_clients
tools.title: List clients
tools.description: List clients from the ERP client directory, most recently onboarded first. Respects the signed-in user's permissions (RLS).

search.description: Optional case-insensitive filter on client name or phone.

limit.description: Max rows to return (default 25, capped at 100).

tools.name: list_sales_orders
tools.title: List sales orders
tools.description: List recent sales orders from the ERP, newest first. Respects the signed-in user's permissions (RLS).

status.description: Optional exact status filter (e.g. completed, pending).

limit.description: Max rows to return (default 25, capped at 100).

tools.name: list_purchase_orders
tools.title: List purchase orders
tools.description: List recent purchase orders from the ERP, newest first. Respects the signed-in user's permissions (RLS).

status.description: Optional exact status filter (e.g. completed, pending).

limit.description: Max rows to return (default 25, capped at 100).

tools.name: get_wallet_balances
tools.title: Get wallet balances
tools.description: Get current multi-asset wallet balances (USDT, TRX, BTC, etc.) from the ERP ledger. Respects the signed-in user's permissions (RLS).
